/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/HojaCalculoAED.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/HojaCalculoAED.dir/HojaCalculoAED_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HojaCalculoAED.dir/src/Core/Aplicacion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HojaCalculoAED.dir/src/Core/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HojaCalculoAED.dir/src/EstructuraDeDatos/MatrizDispersa.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HojaCalculoAED.dir/src/EstructuraDeDatos/Nodo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HojaCalculoAED.dir/src/GUI/VentanaPrincipal.cpp.o -o HojaCalculoAED  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
